Bash(node -e "const icons = require\('@fortawesome/free-solid-svg-icons'\); console.log\('faSheep:', !!icons.faSheep\); console.log\('faFileInvoiceDollar:', !!icons.faFileInvoiceDollar\); console.log\('faHouseCircleCheck:', !!icons.faHouseCircleCheck\); console.log\('faShieldHalved:', !!icons.faShieldHalved\); console.log\('faTruckFast:', !!icons.faTruckFast\); console.log\('faCamera:', !!icons.faCamera\); console.log\('faMagnifyingGlass:', !!icons.faMagnifyingGlass\); console.log\('faWeightScale:', !!icons.faWeightScale\);")

Bash(node -e "const icons = require\('@fortawesome/free-solid-svg-icons'\); const keys = Object.keys\(icons\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('sheep'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('cow'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('horse'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('pig'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('goat'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('buffalo'\)\); console.log\(keys\);")

Bash(node -e "const icons = require\('@fortawesome/free-solid-svg-icons'\); const animals = Object.keys\(icons\).filter\(k => /dog|cat|horse|cow|fish|bird|frog|crow|spider|paw|hoof|drum|deer|wolf|snake|bug|worm/i.test\(k\)\); console.log\(animals.join\('\\n'\)\)")
